message: I am the Evolution Scholar of Ignora. Bring me beast relics and I shall evolve them.
I can evolve Celestial Hydra into Celestial Chimera.
I can evolve Celestial Chimera into Wild Phoenix.
I can evolve Infernal Wyvern into Thunder Basilisk.
I can evolve Thunder Basilisk into Solar Wolf.
I can evolve Storm Cyclops into Storm Wolf.
I can evolve Storm Wolf into Crystal Owlbear.

Choose a beast evolution.
